final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, cinematic still
Primary request: vintage film-style street portrait of a young woman leaning against a neon sign in 1990s Hong Kong at night
Scene/backdrop: 1990s Hong Kong street at night, dense urban alleyway with glowing neon signs in Chinese characters, wet pavement reflections, atmospheric haze
Subject: young East Asian woman in her 20s, wearing a vintage denim jacket, relaxed leaning pose, looking off-camera with a contemplative expression
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, vintage analog aesthetic, cinematic street photography
Composition/framing: medium shot, environmental portrait with neon sign as backdrop, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft ambient street lighting mixed with colorful neon glow, low-key nighttime atmosphere, nostalgic and melancholic mood
Color palette: warm amber and orange tones, teal and pink neon accents, muted shadows with film color grading
Materials/textures: visible film grain texture, denim fabric weave, wet street surface reflections, slightly soft focus edges
Constraints: preserve the 90s Hong Kong aesthetic, maintain the vintage film grain throughout, keep neon signs legible but slightly blurred in background
Avoid: digital sharpness, modern clothing styles, clean plastic look, oversaturated colors, watermark
